name: Jules (MCP)
description: Google's AI coding agent — create sessions, review code diffs, approve plans via the official @google/jules-mcp server.

tools_summary.name: create_session
tools_summary.description: Create a new Jules coding session with a prompt and optional GitHub source

tools_summary.name: get_session_state
tools_summary.description: Get session status, last activity, and pending plans

tools_summary.name: send_reply
tools_summary.description: Send a message or approve a plan in a Jules session

tools_summary.name: get_code_review_context
tools_summary.description: Get session summary with file changes for code review

tools_summary.name: show_code_diff
tools_summary.description: Get the full unidiff patch for session code changes

tools_summary.name: query_cache
tools_summary.description: Query local cache of sessions and activities
